synopsis: Shimmering ribbons of light unfurl across a cosmic void, weaving into complex, ever-shifting celestial tapestries.

shots.prompt: Camera floats through a dark cosmic void as luminous, wide ribbons of deep purple and blue light slowly unfurl and twist into gentle spirals, shimmering with faint gold particles.

The ribbons multiply and intertwine, forming intricate, glowing celestial knots and braids, evolving into a vast, slowly rotating tapestry of light with magenta accents, camera gently weaving through them.

The celestial tapestry becomes immensely dense and complex, glowing with intense bioluminescent energy, forming a colossal, hyper-symmetric structure that slowly rotates and pulses, camera pulling back to reveal its grandeur.
The complex structure gently unravels, the ribbons dissolving into a tranquil river of soft, flowing light, slowly receding into an infinite, softly glowing horizon of deep blue and purple.
